nodes.label: P2.2 CIFAR — dead units (flat 0) and goodness separation across negative types
nodes.rationale: Dead-unit fraction stays pinned at 0.00 across all 8 layers for every negative-type condition (transmission fix from P2.1 holds cleanly); goodness separation collapses from ~14-16 to <1 after layer 1 for random/oracle/unsup, with only hard-proto keeping a slightly elevated tail (~0.8).
